ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Lode FR #200 real-page write-precheck capability packages.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Lode repository, GitHub issue/PR metadata, and read-only research/source locators outside Lode.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Lode write-precheck package assets, registry files, contract docs, and LODE-213 Loom carriers only.
non_goals: No live Xiaohongshu or BOSS login automation
No merge or issue closeout by this execution subagent
validation_expectation: sensitive-material key scan for new write-precheck packages and registry entries
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #200 #213 #214 #215 #216 and final subagent report to the main controller.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Lode package assets, registry fixtures, contract docs, and LODE-213 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Harbor, WebEnvoy/Core, research, and sources paths.
No live Xiaohongshu or BOSS login automation, external-visible publish/save/greet/send/apply actions, safety bypass, merge, or issue closeout actions in the execution subagent.
integration_evidence: Added Xiaohongshu publish-note-precheck package assets using existing validator-supported package roles.
Added BOSS greet-precheck package assets using existing validator-supported package roles.
Added expected change, risk hints, no-submit guard, post-check, failure mapping, redacted fixtures, registry entries, query fixture, and package contract documentation.
Local package validators, registry validation, sensitive-material scan, diff check, Loom verify, fact-chain, suite validate, suite evidence validate, and suite carrier validate were run for PR Ready.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: This PR adds repo-local Lode package assets, registry fixtures, and docs only; it does not add runtime code, cross-repo API ownership, live evidence storage, or executable browser automation.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Validator, registry, Core/App package discovery, resource requirement declaration, fixture shape, expected-change/risk/no-submit output, post-check fixture output, and failure vocabulary.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite when a later PR adds live runtime execution, Core result envelopes, Harbor evidence schemas, true write behavior, hosted registry behavior, or cross-repo contract ownership changes.
